summary.key_theme: Teradyne 受惠於 AI 晶片測試需求強勁及與 Tokyo Electron 的策略合作，並獲納入 Nasdaq-100 指數，儘管面臨總體經濟與地緣政治波動的短期股價震盪。

bullish.title: Five AI and Space Names Join the Nasdaq-100 — Rocket Lab, Astera Labs, CoreWeave, Nebius, and Teradyne replace five index constituents in the quarterly rebalance
bullish.reason: 獲納入 Nasdaq-100 指數將帶來被動資金流入，顯著提升市場能見度與流動性。

bullish.title: Teradyne Introduces Integrated Test Solution for AI and Data Center Devices in Collaboration with Tokyo Electron
bullish.reason: 與 Tokyo Electron 合作開發 AI 晶片測試解決方案，強化了公司在 AI 與資料中心測試領域的技術護城河。

bullish.title: Teradyne Robotics Unveils Wide Range of Production-Ready Physical AI Applications at Automate 2026
bullish.reason: 展示具備實際部署能力的物理 AI 機器人應用，顯示公司在自動化領域的成長潛力。

bullish.title: Teradyne's AI Push Gains Traction: Is the Growth Thesis Strengthening?
bullish.reason: AI 相關業務營收占比已達 70%，成長邏輯持續獲得市場驗證。

bearish.title: onsemi, Teradyne, and Penguin Solutions Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
bearish.reason: 受美國 CPI 年增率達 4.2% 的通膨數據影響，市場對高估值科技股進行修正。

bearish.title: Is Cathie Wood Making Room For SpaceX? ARK Funds Dump Over $200M Across 20 Stocks Ahead Of Mega IPO
bearish.reason: ARK 基金減持 Teradyne 等股票以籌措資金，短期內對股價造成賣壓。

bearish.title: Skyworks Solutions, Western Digital, and Teradyne Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
bearish.reason: 地緣政治緊張（荷姆茲海峽事件）導致市場避險情緒升溫，拖累半導體類股表現。

neutral.title: KLA Corporation, Amkor, and Teradyne Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
neutral.reason: 股價波動主要受地緣政治消息（伊朗軍事衝突取消）驅動，屬於市場情緒面的短期反應。
